queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the mitigating effect of the credit amount requested by the applicant on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical impact of checking account status: no checking account on the likelihood of loan default.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical evidence regarding the negative correlation between checking account status: balance below 0 DM and credit default probability.
